title: OPRT Stock Earnings: Oportun Financial Beats EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Oportun Financial reported earnings per share of 9 cents in Q1 2024, which was above the analyst estimate for EPS of -26 cents. The company reported revenue of $250.50 million, which was 4.15% better than the analyst estimate for revenue of $240.52 million. CEO Raul Vazquez noted that Q1 2024 results reflected an important first step in their 2024 business recovery, as they sharply reduced their prior-year GAAP operating loss by $76 million while returning to adjusted profitability, with cost reduction efforts resulting in a 15% sequential and 25% year-over-year decline in operating expenses. The company provided preliminary Q1 2024 financial information with tightened credit posture contributing to delivering annualized net charge-offs in the bottom half of their guidance range and below the net charge-off rate from last year.
